name: gFloorz - Rooms to Filled Region
description: Extracts Revit room data into 2D filled regions for benchmarking and test fit workflows. Converts room boundaries into filled regions and transfers room names into the 'Comments' parameter to support gFloorz analysis and visualization.
author: your name
outputs: Filled region 'Comments' populated with room names for downstream analysis
how_to_use: Open a Revit model with properly placed and bounded rooms
Select the target plan view for region creation
Verify that filled regions are created and review the Comments parameter for correct room name transfer
Use the output for gFloorz benchmarking or visualization workflows
notes: This script converts BIM spatial data into lightweight 2D representations for analysis workflows. Intended for benchmarking and gFloorz use cases, not for documentation. Accuracy depends on valid room boundaries.
